# HYDRATE-JIRA-TICKET v1.0.1

Update an existing Jira ticket using the Atlassian skill (@.agents/skills/atlassian/SKILL.md). If the user has not provided a ticket ID or description, ask them for it.

The expected usage is:

```
/HYDRATE-JIRA-TICKET <ticket-id> <description>
```

## Prerequisites

- Atlassian CLI (`acli`) installed and authenticated (@.agents/skills/atlassian/SKILL.md)

## REQUIRED INFORMATION:

- Ticket ID (ask if not provided)
- Description (ask if not provided)

## STEPS:

1. Using the user's description as a guide, update the Jira ticket with the new information based on what you can gather from the codebase
   a. Analyze the code base relative to the user's description
   b. Update the Jira ticket with the new information, which includes:
   - Description
   - Acceptance criteria
   - Code insights and implementation recommendations

## OUTPUT:

Provide the updated ticket ID and confirmation of all actions completed.
